arts.ttl: Stoke City transfer latest as key double search extends into New Year
arts.sum: Stoke City are continuing plans to try to add ‘a little bit of Championship know-how’ to the squad in the new transfer window – at the same time as the club searches for a new head coach or manager. We’ve got people coming back from injury; Sam Gallagher, Bosun (Lawal), Ben Pearson hopefully not too far away, Enda Stevens
